title: Bass Management Group meeting minutes
body: "The establishment of the Bass Management Group was a main commitment of the bass fisheries management plan (FMP) published in December 2023.   The group meets quarterly, or more often if needed. Views and recommendations from any sub-groups will be brought to the group for review, with all final decisions taken by Defra.       If you have any questions about the group or to request information referred to in the minutes, email bassFMP@defra.gov.uk.  "
